summary: Converged `coolify-lv3` with governed Docker daemon resolvers plus the approved Docker Hub mirror, regenerated the shared edge static-site artifacts, replayed the NGINX public edge, and redeployed `education_wemeshup` from upstream `main` so the public production domain now serves catalog version `2.0.0` with `1056` activities and `95` categories.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_coolify_tool.py tests/test_coolify_playbook.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_edge_publication_playbooks.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py tests/test_lv3_cli.py -q` passed with `94 passed in 2.07s`.

`HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN=... make converge-coolify env=production` converged `coolify-lv3`; the run later failed only during the shared edge static-site sync because the fresh worktree lacked `build/changelog-portal/` and `build/docs-portal/`.

verification.check: Governed Docker daemon hardening on coolify-lv3
verification.observed: `ssh ... ops@10.10.10.70 'sudo cat /etc/docker/daemon.json'` returned `dns: [1.1.1.1, 8.8.8.8]` and `registry-mirrors: [https://mirror.gcr.io]`, and a follow-up process probe showed no lingering `docker-buildx`, `timeout --foreground`, or `npm ci` processes.

verification.check: Shared public-edge replay from fresh worktree
verification.observed: After `make generate-changelog-portal docs`, `HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN=... make configure-edge-publication env=production` completed with `nginx-lv3 ok=61 changed=4 failed=0` and rendered the wildcard Coolify apps upstream through HTTPS `443`.

`python3 scripts/coolify_tool.py deploy-repo --repo git@github.com:baditaflorin/education_wemeshup.git --branch main --source private-deploy-key --app-name education-wemeshup --project 'LV3 Apps' --environment production --build-pack dockercompose --docker-compose-location /compose.yaml --compose-domain catalog-web=education-wemeshup.apps.example.com --ports 80 --wait --timeout 5400 --force --max-deploy-attempts 5 --retry-delay 5` finished on attempt `1` with deployment `it09nv91sn40tvugmqj3u043` against upstream commit `dd577f374051d24710b461e9cfb796e21ad49da2`.

`https://education-wemeshup.apps.example.com/` returned `HTTP/2 200`, `/api/v1/catalog/taxonomy` returned catalog version `2.0.0`, `activityCount: 1056`, and `categoryCount: 95`, and `/api/v1/catalog/activities?limit=1` returned `returned: 1` with `hasNextPage: true`.

notes: The live edge replay depends on the shared static portal artifacts; from a fresh worktree, generate `build/changelog-portal/` and `build/docs-portal/` before running `make configure-edge-publication`.

This receipt records the first live slice of ADR 0274 on `coolify-lv3`: resolver pinning plus the approved Docker Hub mirror. Scheduled image warming and catalog-managed image bundles remain follow-up work.
